changes.value: Test at `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/project/delete.rs:177` fails: `assertion failed: matches!(result, Err(KanbanError::ProjectHasTasks { .. }))`. The delete operation is not returning the expected `ProjectHasTasks` error variant when a project with tasks is deleted. #test-failure
